015 */
016package org.consensusj.rx.zeromq;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.BackpressureStrategy;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.disposables.Disposable;
021import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.FlowableProcessor;
022import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.PublishProcessor;
023import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
024import org.reactivestreams.Subscriber;
025import org.slf4j.Logger;
026import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
027import org.zeromq.SocketType;
028import org.zeromq.ZContext;
029import org.zeromq.ZMQ;
030import org.zeromq.ZMsg;
031
032import java.io.Closeable;
033import java.net.URI;
034import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
035import java.util.List;
036import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
037import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
038
039/**
040 * ZMQ Context with a single socket and one {@code Processor<ZMsg>} per topic.
041 * It subscribes {@code SUB} to one or more topics using ZMQ and receives a multiplexed
042 * stream of {@link ZMsg} from the {@link ZMsgSocketFlowable}. In {@link RxZmqContext#onNext} the {@code ZMsg}
043 * are de-multiplexed by the {@code topic} {@code String} and placed in a per-topic
044 * {@code Processor<ZMsg>}.
045 * <p>
046 * Topics (at least for now) must be passed to the constructor.
047 * It would be nice to be able to subscribe to topics at the ZMQ level when we first get
048 * subscriptions at the Rx level. This will probably require using a ZPoller or something like that.
049 */
050public class RxZmqContext implements Closeable {
051    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RxZmqContext.class);
052    private final ZContext zContext;
053    private final Disposable disposable;
054
055    // Map of topic names to per-topic Processor
056    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, FlowableProcessor<ZMsg>> processors = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
057
058    public RxZmqContext(URI tcpAddress, List<String> topics) {
059        this(tcpAddress, topics, (Runnable r) -> new Thread(r, "ZeroMQ Subscriber"));
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * @param tcpAddress Address of ZMQ server to connect to
064     * @param topics a list of topics to subscribe to
065     * @param threadFactory factory to create a thread for the receive loop (see {@link ZMsgSocketFlowable#createFromSocket(ZMQ.Socket, ThreadFactory)})
066     */
067    public RxZmqContext(URI tcpAddress, List<String> topics, ThreadFactory threadFactory) {
068        zContext = new ZContext();
069        //  Socket to talk to server
070        log.info("Connecting to Zmq server at: {}", tcpAddress);
071
072        ZMQ.Socket socket = zContext.createSocket(SocketType.SUB);
073        socket.connect(tcpAddress.toString());
074
075        topics.forEach(topic -> {
076            log.info("Subscribing to topic: {}", topic);
077            this.addTopic(topic);
078            socket.subscribe(topic);
079        });
080
081        disposable = Flowable.fromPublisher(ZMsgSocketFlowable.createFromSocket(socket, threadFactory))
082                .subscribe(this::onNext, this::onError, this::onComplete);
083        log.info("Connected.. Waiting for subscribers.");
084    }
085
086    /**
087     * Get a Publisher (internally is an RxJava3 Flowable) for a given topic
088     *
089     * @param topic a valid topic as passed to the constructor
090     * @return A Publisher for the topic
091     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if topic wasn't configured in the constructor
092     */
093    public Publisher<ZMsg> topicPublisher(String topic) {
094        Publisher<ZMsg> publisher = processors.get(topic);
095        if (publisher == null) {
096            throw new IllegalArgumentException("topic unavailable -- topics must be passed to constructor");
097        }
098        return publisher;
099    }
100
101    @Override
102    public void close() {
103        disposable.dispose();
104        zContext.close();
105    }
106
107    private void onNext(ZMsg zMsg) {
108        // Deliver message to correct processor for topic
109        String topic = zMsg.getFirst().getString(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
110        Subscriber<ZMsg> subscriber = processors.get(topic);
111        subscriber.onNext(zMsg);
112    }
113
114    private void onError(Throwable throwable) {
115        // Propagate upstream onError to all downstream
116        processors.values().forEach(p -> p.onError(throwable));
117    }
118
119    private void onComplete() {
120        // Propagate upstream onComplete to all downstream
121        processors.values().forEach(Subscriber::onComplete);
122    }
123
124    private void addTopic(String topic) {
125        processors.computeIfAbsent(topic, keyTopic -> PublishProcessor.create());
126    }
127}
